◎简　　介  

　　This show is based on the book by the French writer Jules Verne. It is about a group of people who escaped from a Civil War battlefield by balloon and ended up on an island in the south Pacific. It seems uninhabited but a person called Captain Nemo is actually watching them all the time.
introduction: This show is based on the book by the French writer Jules Verne. It is about a group of people who escaped from a Civil War battlefield by balloon and ended up on an island in the south Pacific. It seems uninhabited but a person called Captain Nemo is actually watching them all the time.
